message:
feat(search): add SearchOrchestrator for frankensearch migration (ft-dr6zv.1.3.2)

Introduce orchestration abstraction layer (B1) with Legacy/Bridge backend
selection, env-var override, A/B comparison mode, and migration metrics.
Add Serialize/Deserialize to TwoTierMetrics. 22 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
